title: euodia sambucina
intro: Euodia sambucina, also known as Sambuci Flos or Elderflower, is a flowering plant native to Europe and Asia, belonging to the family Rutaceae. The medicinal properties of Euodia sambucina include its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which contribute to its ability to soothe respiratory issues and reduce fever. The health benefits of Euodia sambucina include alleviating symptoms of colds, flu, and hay fever, as well as acting as an anti-oxidant and immune system booster. Euodia sambucina can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, capsules, and infusions, allowing for convenient and effective use of its medicinal properties.
